ariaSpec.usage: The input element follows the combobox specification.
Indicates the component has a Dialog Popup.
Announces whether the Popup is visible or not.
Points to the popup element containing the calendar or time selector.
Points to the focused item in the Calendar or Time Popup.

ariaSpec.attribute: label for or aria-label or aria-labelledby
ariaSpec.usage: The input needs an accessible name.
Rendered only when the picker is in form and announces invalid state.
Rendered only when the picker is disabled.
Button element must not be focusable.
The button needs an accessible name.
Rendered only when the picker is disabled.

kbSpec.behavior: Discards the selection and closes the popup.
Enters in time edit if calendar is the target. Otherwise, accepts the selected time and closes the popup.
Opens the dropdown and moves the focus to the displayed calendar.
Closes the dropdown and moves the focus to the input element.
